name: node-got
title: node-got
description:
Simplified HTTP requests
This module provides a nicer interface to the built-in http module.
.
This module was created because request is bloated *(several megabytes!)*.
.
Highlights:
- Promise & stream API
- Request cancellation
- Follows redirects
- Retries on network failure
- Handles gzip/deflate
- Timeout handling
- Errors with metadata
- JSON mode
- WHATWG URL support
- Electron support
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-got because Simplified HTTP requests.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-got as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-got with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-got --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
